headline: Lennox International Inc (NYSE:LII) Passes Caviar Cruise Screen with Strong Profitability and Growth
summary: Lennox International (LII) passes the "Caviar Cruise" quality screen with strong profitability, consistent growth, and a healthy balance sheet, despite a premium valuation.
